novel_features.name: Unified player dossier
novel_features.description: Type any player name and get market value, EA FC rating, potential, and key stats in one report.
novel_features.rationale: Resolves a name once and fans out to Transfermarkt, EA FC, sofifa/fifacm, and ESPN, merging four walled silos into a single report no other tool joins.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Reach for this first: it answers what's he worth, how good is he, how good will he get, in one call.

novel_features.name: Team squad value+rating board
novel_features.description: Type a club name and get the full squad with each player's market value and rating, plus squad totals.
novel_features.rationale: Joins the Transfermarkt squad roster with per-player EA ratings and potential in one board; the sources never live together anywhere else.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use for scouting a whole squad's value and quality at once instead of N single lookups.

novel_features.name: Market-vs-game divergence
novel_features.description: Flag players whose transfer-market value is far above or below their EA game rating.
novel_features.rationale: Requires a local join of Transfermarkt market value and EA rating that only exists once both are cached together.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Surfaces market bargains and hype the raw rating alone can't show.

novel_features.name: Potential growth gap
novel_features.description: Rank players by headroom (potential minus current rating).
novel_features.rationale: Needs potential from sofifa/fifacm joined to current from EA locally; no single source carries both.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Find who still has the most room to grow. Best-effort on potential source.

novel_features.name: Cross-source head-to-head
novel_features.description: Side-by-side value, rating, potential, and stats for two players.
novel_features.rationale: One local join renders both players across every source at once.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Settle debates with value + rating + potential + stats in one view.

novel_features.name: Wonderkid scout query
novel_features.description: Find young players with high potential and rising market value.
novel_features.rationale: Joins Transfermarkt age and value with sofifa potential, the classic scout filter no single source can answer.
novel_features.why_it_matters: The scouting query football data tools can't run because the inputs live in different silos.

narrative.headline: Type any player or club and get market value, EA FC rating, potential, and stats in one report, joined across sources that live in separate walled silos.
narrative.value_prop: soccer-goat resolves a name once and fans out to Transfermarkt market value, EA Sports FC ratings and attribute stats, sofifa/fifacm potential, and ESPN context, then merges them into a single report. A local SQLite store unlocks cross-source queries no single site can answer: over/under-rated vs the market, potential growth gaps, and wonderkid scouting.

quickstart.comment: confirm sources are reachable before a lookup
the headline: one name, full cross-source report
the whole squad with values and ratings

troubleshoots.fix: sofifa/fifacm sit behind Cloudflare, so potential is best-effort and shows as unavailable without a cleared session. Paste a cleared-Cloudflare cookie into SOCCER_GOAT_FIFACM_COOKIE (or SOCCER_GOAT_SOFIFA_COOKIE) and retry.
point at your own transfermarkt-api instance with SOCCER_GOAT_BASE_URL, or wait and retry; the public instance is shared.
ESPN soccer player coverage is thin; the report omits it cleanly and still returns value + rating + potential.

narrative.when_to_use: Use soccer-goat when you want a player's or club's market value, game rating, potential, and stats together in one shot, or when you want to run cross-source queries like over/under-rated or wonderkid scouting that need value and rating joined locally. It is the right tool any time the answer spans Transfermarkt plus EA FC plus FIFA-style potential.
anti_triggers: Do not use for live match scores or fixtures; use a dedicated ESPN or scores tool.
Do not use for fantasy-football price/points optimization; it reports market value and game ratings, not FPL prices.
Do not use for betting odds.

recipes.title: Full player report
recipes.explanation: One name in, market value + EA rating + potential + key stats out.

recipes.title: Squad board
recipes.explanation: Narrow a large squad payload to just name, value, and rating.

recipes.title: Find market bargains
recipes.explanation: Players the game rates high but the market rates low, and vice versa.

recipes.title: Scout wonderkids
recipes.explanation: Young, high-potential, rising-value players in one filtered list.

trigger_phrases: what's schjelderup worth and how good is he
